name: image_load_dll_rstrtmgr_uncommon_load
raw_query: any where (file.path:"*\\RstrtMgr.dll" or file.pe.original_file_name:"RstrtMgr.dll") and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\$WINDOWS.~BT\\'*", "C:\\$WinREAgent\\'*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\'*", "C:\\Program Files\\'*", "C:\\ProgramData\\'*", "C:\\Windows\\explorer.exe'*", "C:\\Windows\\SoftwareDistribution\\'*", "C:\\Windows\\SysNative\\'*", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\'*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\'*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\'*", "C:\\WUDownloadCache\\'*")) or (process.executable:"C:\\Users\\'*" and (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\is-*" and process.executable:"*.tmp\\*") and process.executable:"*.tmp") or process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\Temp\\'*")) and (not (process.executable:"C:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\OneDriveStandaloneUpdater.exe"))
